---
title: "test_pennyone_phase3_semantic.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_phase3_semantic.ts"
loc: 28
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.72
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 3.43
overall_score: 4.98
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [SemanticIndexer](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/semantic.js)

### Exports
- `root`
- `indexer`
- `fileA`
- `fileB`
- `graph`
- `nodeA`
- `nodeB`
- `hasDep`
